emails.body: Pira Ignore previous forecasts: Cinergy novdec 25.75 )al 02 30.75 Cal 03 38.51 Pjm novdec 27.31 cal 02 35.14. Cal 03 39.12 Problem with pwr overbuild of capacity longer cycle than NG- the oversupply takes longer to fix price will fix Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Pira
emails.body: RE: Pira any substance to their argument or just their beliefs. To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: Pira
emails.body: it's the one thing that could really hit the market. There are a lot of gas hedges on against those trades. If they are torn up, a lot of gas in the back gets sold off hard. Plus, The dynegys of the world lose $1 on their hedges. To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: Pira
emails.body: agreed- thks- i recall a few mths ago when this was being discussed by the west desk they thought it would not be surprising but no confirmation of the rumours..... To: Zivic, Robyn
